description: Basic eligibility verification call with clear Blue Cross identifiers.
transcript:
Hi, this is Maya Thompson. I have an MRI next week and I want to confirm if it is covered.
I have Blue Cross and my member ID is BCX-4439201. My date of birth is 02/14/1985.
Can you tell me what my benefits look like and what I should do next?

gold.expected_next_step: Confirm prior auth requirement for MRI and proceed with scheduling.
